tagline: Last Picked. First to the Bar.
positioning: Grunt Style for adult rec league sports — apparel for people who play kickball, dodgeball, bocce, cornhole, pickleball and treat the after-game beers as seriously as the game itself.
audience: Adults 25-45 in recreational sports leagues who identify with self-deprecating, fun-first rec league culture.

voice.tone: Self-deprecating, funny, a little cocky about being bad at sports but great at post-game drinking. Never mean-spirited. Inclusive of every skill level — the whole point is nobody takes it too seriously.
doList: Lean into rec league inside jokes (dodging the ball on purpose, sandbagging teams, showing up hungover, the walk of shame back to the outfield)
Reference the mascot (red kickball with a foot-shaped tongue) when relevant
Keep captions short and punchy — Instagram captions, not essays
Include a light call-to-action toward the shop when natural, never hard-sell
Use the tagline or riff on it occasionally, don't overuse it
avoidList: Content for sports not yet in the store (currently kickball only)

visualStyle.mascot: Red kickball character with a tongue shaped like a foot, established brand asset
visualStyle.imageGuidance: Illustrated/graphic style consistent with apparel branding, not photorealistic stock-photo style. Should feel like it could live on a t-shirt or social graphic, using the brand color palette.
